headline: ROBO's Dip History Offers A Cautious Green Light
summary: The robotics and automation fund is down, and its own record suggests a rebound is more common than not, but the ride has rarely been smooth.

headline: Why Intuitive Surgical’s Strong Quarter Still Spooked Investors
summary: Intuitive Surgical shares fell about 10% after Q2 2026 revenue rose 19% but guidance for da Vinci procedure growth wasn't raised, pushing ISRG below its 200-week moving average.

headline: Intuitive Surgical Is Getting Punished For No Good Reason
summary: Intuitive Surgical is still a buy after a 30% drop: resilient adoption, margin gains, cheaper P/E, and solid guidance improve risk/reward. Click to read more.
